data.title: Ozz Resources Grants Scorpion Minerals Option Over Maguires Reward as Leonora Exploration Slows
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Ozz Resources Ltd ( (AU:OZZ) ) has provided an announcement.

Ozz Resources has signed a binding option agreement granting Scorpion Minerals an exclusive right to acquire 100% of its Maguires Reward project, in a transaction that would amount to the disposal of Ozz’s main undertaking and therefore requires shareholder approval under ASX rules. The deal delivers an immediate option fee of $100,000 and a further $2.5 million in cash or Scorpion shares upon conditions being met and the option exercised by December 2026, which the board views as providing attractive post-tax value for shareholders, while on-ground exploration at the company’s Mt Davis and Pepper Tree projects near Leonora was minimal during the quarter, with some tenure voluntarily surrendered at Pepper Tree.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:OZZ) stock is a Sell with a A$0.05 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Ozz Resources Ltd stock, see the AU:OZZ Stock Forecast page.

More about Ozz Resources Ltd

Ozz Resources Ltd is an Australian exploration company focused on gold projects in the Leonora region of Western Australia, including the Mt Davis and Pepper Tree (formerly Pinnacle Well) projects. Its activities centre on early-stage exploration such as soil sampling, litho-geochemical review and target generation along key shear zones and greenstone-sedimentary rock contacts near major transport corridors in the Goldfields region.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

See more insights into OZZ stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

BWP Trust ( (AU:BWP) ) has provided an announcement.

BWP Group has issued an update to its previous dividend/distribution announcement for the six‑month period ended 31 December 2025, primarily to advise of a change to the issue price under its distribution reinvestment plan (DRP). The distribution relates to stapled ordinary units on issue, with the record date set at 31 December 2025 and the ex‑date at 30 December 2025, providing clarity for investors on key timing and pricing parameters for the upcoming payout and reinvestment arrangements.

BWP Group is an Australian listed entity that invests in and manages a portfolio of fully paid ordinary stapled securities, with its units traded on the ASX under the code BWP. The trust structure typically focuses on property-related investment, providing income distributions to securityholders over defined reporting periods.

Home First Finance Company India Limited has announced that its officials will hold one-on-one meetings with analysts and institutional investors on January 27 and February 2, 2026, in line with SEBI’s disclosure norms. data.title: Golden Age Exploration Raises $255,000 in Private Placement and Announces Option Exercises
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Golden Age Exploration Ltd. ( (TSE:GDN) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Golden Age Exploration Ltd. has closed a non-brokered private placement, raising $255,000 through the issuance of 5.1 million units at $0.05 per unit, each comprising one common share and a transferable warrant exercisable at $0.065 for two years, to fund working capital, administration, exploration and evaluation expenditures, and other short-term investments. The financing included a related-party subscription of 1 million units by a company controlled by the president and director, which qualified for exemptions under applicable securities rules, and the company also reported the exercise of 200,000 management stock options at $0.10, resulting in the issuance of additional shares and modestly increasing insider ownership and the company’s cash position.

More about Golden Age Exploration Ltd.

Golden Age Exploration Ltd., listed on the Canadian Securities Exchange under the symbol GDN, operates in the mineral exploration sector, focusing on identifying and advancing early-stage exploration projects. The company deploys capital toward exploration and evaluation activities alongside general corporate and administrative functions to support its growth strategy.

Average Trading Volume: 251,000

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

See more insights into GDN stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Anteris Files U.S. Prospectus Supplement to Support Growth of Structural Heart Portfolio
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Anteris Technologies ( (AU:AVR) ) has shared an announcement.

Anteris Technologies Global Corp. announced that it has filed a Prospectus Supplement with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission, a step that supports its ongoing capital markets activities in the United States as it advances commercialization plans for its structural heart portfolio. The filing underscores the company’s efforts to strengthen its financial and regulatory footing in key markets while it progresses clinical evaluation of its flagship DurAVR THV system, positioning Anteris to compete more effectively in the growing transcatheter aortic valve replacement segment and potentially enhance long-term value for patients, clinicians and investors.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:AVR) stock is a Buy with a A$10.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Anteris Technologies stock, see the AU:AVR Stock Forecast page.

More about Anteris Technologies

Anteris Technologies Global Corp. (NASDAQ: AVR, ASX: AVR) is a global structural heart company focused on designing, developing and commercializing advanced medical devices to restore healthy heart function. Founded in Australia and with a significant presence in Minneapolis, it targets patients with structural heart disease through its lead product DurAVR THV, a balloon-expandable, biomimetic aortic valve system made from its patented ADAPT anti-calcification tissue technology, which has been used in more than 55,000 patients worldwide and is currently being evaluated in the PARADIGM clinical trial for treating aortic stenosis.

Average Trading Volume: 22,169

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Austin Metals Limited ( (AU:AYT) ) has issued an update.

Austin Metals Limited has called an in-person general meeting of shareholders to be held at its Perth offices on 23 February 2026 at 10:00am AWST. Shareholders eligible to vote will be those on the register as at 10:00am AWST on 21 February 2026, and meeting materials, including the notice of meeting and annual report, are available via the company’s website and ASX announcements platform.

The company is encouraging shareholders to participate and vote via its share registry’s online proxy platform, reflecting a continued shift toward electronic communications in line with updated Australian corporate law provisions. The meeting’s outcome may influence governance and strategic decisions, underscoring the importance of shareholder engagement ahead of any resolutions to be considered.
